title: Outcome dashboard (validated features, pass rate, use events)
context: open-map-gaps tracks outcome metrics (validated features, pass rate, reverts-for-cause, beneficiary use events) in the outcome ledger (outcomes/*.json). A dashboard that reads this ledger and visualizes the success metrics gives the Steward, partners, and the public a live view of project impact. The dashboard reads only — it does not write to OSM, call any OSM API, or expose any sensitive data.
objective: Build and ship a read-only outcome dashboard that reads the outcome ledger and displays validated-feature counts, pass rates, revert counts, and beneficiary use events.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard reads the outcome ledger (outcomes/*.json) and displays: validated-feature counts, pass rate, revert count and reverts-for-cause, and verified beneficiary use events.
Dashboard is read-only: no OSM API calls, no write operations, no sensitive data exposed.
Ships with a golden fixture (sample ledger → expected dashboard output); pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
Code is licensed MIT; commits are DCO signed-off.
output: A merged PR containing the read-only outcome dashboard (TypeScript/ESM), a golden fixture, and passing CI.
